error_signature: no error and no result from Extract From CSV node
title: Extract From CSV node returns no result due to quotes
symptom: The Extract From CSV node does not return any error or result when processing a valid CSV file. The expected output is missing.
not_this_if: CSV file does not contain quotes
Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The Extract From CSV node fails to process CSV files correctly when the columns contain quotes. This can lead to no output being generated, even if the CSV is valid.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Extract From CSV node
Re-run the workflow with the CSV file
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Preserve Quotes' option in the Extract From CSV node settings and save the workflow.
